Usage questions are not handled through GitHub issues.

**Check these resources first — most questions are already answered:**

- [Documentation](https://reactdatatable.com)
- [Recipes & examples](https://reactdatatable.com/docs/recipes)
- [Existing issues](https://github.com/jbetancur/react-data-table-component/issues?q=is%3Aissue)

**Need hands-on help?** Email [johnnyazee@gmail.com](mailto:johnnyazee@gmail.com) to discuss consulting.

*Please open a bug report or feature request if you've found a reproducible problem or have a concrete proposal.*
